title: ExecutionPlan
description: Planner output: ordered steps, flags for clarification or no_match, and optional unsupported subqueries. Aligns with architecture §5.2. PlanStep.parameters holds step-scoped data; merge with AIServiceRequest fields for step_run_state (parameters win on duplicate keys). Same field name as orchestrator-agent-input.plan_item.parameters.

step_id.description: Unique ID for this step, e.g. step_1

capability_id.description: Capability from capability-registry.json (e.g. summary, triage, kb_search)

service_id.description: ITSM entity type from service-registry.json (e.g. incident, request, problem, change)

tool_ids.description: Allowlisted tools for this step (subset/order may be refined by executor from agent-tool-mapping.json).

parameters.description: Step-scoped parameters (e.g. ticket_id, service_id). Do not require message here; omit to use session message.

order_hint.description: Execution order — lower runs first (aligned with orchestrator-agent-input.schema.json).

depends_on.description: step_ids that must complete before this step

dependency_type.description: hard = executor blocks dependent steps until this step succeeds; soft = executor proceeds with dependent steps even if this step fails (best-effort pre-check). When omitted, defaults to hard.

requires_approval.description: When true, executor must not run mutating tools for this step until explicit user confirmation or platform approval signal is received. Step result is blocked until resolved.

steps.description: Ordered plan steps; may be empty when needs_clarification or no_match is true.

needs_clarification.description: When true, pipeline should not execute steps; surface clarification_question (maps to TeamRunOutput.final_status clarification_required).

clarification_question.description: Must be a non-empty string when needs_clarification is true. Use plain language the chat UI can show as-is — one clear question, optionally with examples.

no_match.description: When true, intent could not be routed (maps to TeamRunOutput.final_status no_match).

fallback_message.description: Optional user-visible copy when clarifying or no_match.

unsupported_subqueries.description: Sub-intents the planner declined to plan (may be echoed on TeamRunOutput).

examples.clarification_question: Which ticket should I summarize? I found INC001 and REQ042.
